objectClass.notes: This is a repository-authored procedural brief, not an image reconstruction. Form and dimensions are authoring targets awaiting browser visual review.

reasoning: A lathed body must connect cleanly to two curve-swept appendages while preserving a readable product silhouette.
The lid requires a hinge-local pivot, detach socket, construction collider input, and exact reset behavior.
Full, budgeted, and minimum representations must reduce sweep and lathe tessellation without changing semantic identities.

specDepthDecision.rationale: Smooth form continuity, a movable lid, multiple material zones, and cross-tier identity require explicit component and runtime contracts.

definitionOfDone: The design and profile cameras show a coherent lathed belly, genuinely open neck with inner wall and recessed cavity, rising spout, rear handle, seated lid, foot ring, and restrained product-scale proportions.
Action-ready mode proves the lid hinge and exact reset without claiming rigid-body or fluid-solver authority.
Every visual tier preserves the exported protected node, socket, collider-construction-input, and destruction-group IDs.

featureGroups.name: Lathed body, neck, lid, foot, and knob
qualityCriteria: The semantic-indexed lathe keeps a continuous outer volume, open neck, inner rim wall, and a recessed cavity disk whose declared open rim overlaps the inner-wall footprint; the lid remains seated at the authored neck before motion.
failureModes: annular crack between inner wall and cavity floor
false closed-boundary claim for the cavity disk

featureGroups.name: Rising tapered spout with outlet
qualityCriteria: Parallel-transport frames keep the tapered sweep continuous and the outlet socket follows the authored pour direction.

featureGroups.name: Rear swept handle and mounts
qualityCriteria: The grip arc remains readable and both mounts visibly overlap the body.

featureGroups.name: Hinge-local detachable lid
qualityCriteria: Action-ready motion originates at the named hinge, opens visibly, and restores the exact authored transform.

featureGroups.name: Glaze, clay, and brass separation
qualityCriteria: Clearcoated celadon, rough clay, dark outlet, and metallic fittings remain distinct under neutral light.

visualDeltaChecks: spout rise, taper, outlet direction, and root overlap
handle negative space and mount continuity
lid hinge location, open angle, and exact reset
celadon, clay, outlet, and brass material separation
antiShallowSpecRules: Reject a generic sphere body or straight-cylinder spout in place of lathe and parallel-transport sweep construction.
Reject a lid mesh without an independently targetable hinge pivot and detach socket.
Reject visual-tier changes that alter protected semantic or construction-input IDs.
Reject continuity signatures that omit identity-changing seed or source revision inputs, or that treat a visual tier change as a new authored generation.
Reject any canonical collider, rigid-body, contact, or fluid-simulation claim from authoring metadata alone.
Reject visual acceptance while reference and browser evidence remain unavailable.

authoringInstruction: Use this assessment as an authored benchmark contract. It does not constitute reference-image or visual-acceptance evidence.
